mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS id, u.name AS userName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.clock_in AS clockIn, a.clock_out AS clockOut, mu.name AS modifiedBy, a.modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users mu ON a.modified_by = mu.id

SELECT a.id AS id, u.name AS userName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.clock_in AS clockIn, a.clock_out AS clockOut, mu.name AS modifiedBy, a.modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users mu ON a.modified_by = mu.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (user_id, work_date, clock_in, clock_out, modified_by, modified_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{workDate}, #{clockIn}, #{clockOut}, #{modifiedBy}, #{modifiedAt})
